metadata.tracks_note: 19 tracks per variant. Tracks 0-6 are normalized effect scores (CAGE, splice, RNA-seq, etc). Tracks 7-8 are contact maps. Tracks 9-12 are splice/junction tracks (empty for some variants). Tracks 13-18 are raw-scale scores (same modalities as 0-6 but unnormalized). Track 16 has the largest raw values across all variants.

summary.description: Ranked by track 16 max effect (largest raw-scale track). All 5 variants show nonzero functional predictions, consistent with being regulatory rather than inert.
